decisions.title: Migrate Explore V1 users to Explore V2 before EOL
decisions.context: ENG-8140 building migration banner/intercept. Need to decide cutover timeline and forced migration date to focus eng on V2 features vs maintaining V1.

arguments.for: Frees eng capacity to build V2 moat features, reduces tech debt, aligns with 'Nail the Core' pillar
arguments.against: Risk customer churn if V2 doesn't have feature parity, support burden during transition

decisions.title: Prioritize Sift Edge stability fixes vs new features
decisions.context: ENG-9436 shows Edge crashes on SQL lock contention. Critical for 'Embed Deeper' pillar but stability issues block adoption. Choose: pause features to fix core or ship-and-patch.

arguments.for: Stability = trust = adoption. Can't embed deeper with crashy product. Aligns with 'Nail the Core'
arguments.against: Market window closing, competitors shipping features, customers asking for capabilities not fixes

decisions.title: Invest in Annotations infrastructure or deprecate feature
decisions.context: ENG-9044, ENG-9451 show ongoing E2 Annotations tech debt. Runless asset work + legacy property cleanup indicates foundational issues. Half-built features drain resources.

arguments.for: Annotations drive 'Decisions Captured' if done right. Core to Canvas vision. Finish what we started
arguments.against: Low usage, high maintenance cost. Resources better spent on Python Rules or Ask SIFT differentiation

decisions.title: Address memory/scaling issues before next growth phase
decisions.context: ENG-9344 (exports leak), ENG-9133 (OOM), ENG-9429/9391 (unbounded memory growth) across multiple services. Infrastructure not scaling with Signal>Evidence workload.
decisions.blockedBy: Need cost-benefit analysis: re-architect now vs incremental fixes vs limit customer growth

arguments.for: Scaling ceiling blocks 'Embed Deeper'. Firefighting costs more than planned fixes. Customer trust erodes with outages
arguments.against: Months of eng time, delays feature roadmap, current workarounds functional, growth not immediate

decisions.title: Consolidate alert/monitoring strategy to reduce noise
decisions.context: ENG-9445 (alert noise reduction), ENG-6842 (test error logging), multiple stability tickets suggest poor signal-to-noise in monitoring. Teams fatigued, real issues buried.

arguments.for: Better signals = faster response = better uptime. Team health. Models our own 'Signal>Evidence>Decision' value prop
arguments.against: Not customer-facing, competes with feature work, risk of over-tuning and missing real issues

timeAudit.weekSummary: 63% meeting load eroding deep work capacity. 30 Linear tickets in flight signal context-switching tax. Need decision-forcing mechanisms to consolidate workstreams.
alerts: 3 consecutive days <3hr focus blocks - strategic work at risk
15 engineering tickets marked as bugs/fixes vs 15 features - firefighting parity
ENG-9238 RFC spec'd but no review scheduled - decision latency building
